readme_task_contract.summary: Marble omission clips; marbles are dynamic, gate/wall/barrier is context.

queries.prompt:
As you have seen, both the green and the blue player failed to hit the grey marble in this round. So, the team didn't score a point.

Which player is more to blame that the grey marble did not go through the gate?

config_metadata.experimentName: A counterfactual simulation model of causation by omission (Exp 3)
config_metadata.description: You will watch a short video clip of a marble game involving two players. After watching the clip, you will answer questions about what you observed.
